name: Mean Pinkie Pie
description:
(Character from 'My Little Pony Friendship is Magic') An "evil" clone of Pinkie Pie created by Queen Chrysalis in a ploy to wield the Elements of Harmony by creating clones of the Mane Six. Her plan doesn't work out as the clones turn against her and the Tree of Harmony tendrils of light and liquefies their bodies, reducing them to the clumps of wood they were originally, all except for Mean Pinkie.

[Reupload from an old account.]
creator: Doggonnit_277
